title: Industrial Painting and Coating
content:
Fabtech International has a wealth of experience in industrial coating management service. With over 25 years’ experience, we possess the know-how, expertise, and capability to complete our projects quickly and efficiently. Composed of a team of competent staff, we have the capability to handle the preliminaries such as surface preparation and coat selection up to the application process. Furthermore, we also provide an inspection team to finalize the task. Our products and equipment are highly resilient and qualified as per the standards of NACE and British Gas certifications. It is proof that we are hands-on in ensuring quality results each time.
Our coating solutions extend to server tanks, pipes, and steel mills, among many other surfaces, complemented with highly competitive prices. Due to its anti-carbon property, our paints are UV resistant, weather-resistant, and will last long. With Fabtech, you can polish up your equipment’s aesthetic value while steering away from damage and corrosion. To know more or avail of our protective coating service in Dubai, feel free to reach out to our industrial painting specialists. We will guide you through the process and help you make the right decision.
At Fabtech International, we provide conventional tank lining services to ensure the prolonged durability of your tank equipment. We use Epoxy Vinyl Ester and Fiberglass that serve several types of tank linings such as oil products, food-grade linings, and portable water tanks.
We offer internal pipe coating using solvent-free epoxy, which aligns with international standards, thereby assuring you of quality and reliability.
Our external pipe coating service is applicable for cross-country pipes, buried pipelines, field joint coating, and shrink sleeves. They are built for heavy-duty and lightweight machinery alike.
Environmental safety is one of our biggest concerns. Hence, we carry out anti-carbon coating on floors, bridges and buildings, marine machinery, pipes, and more.
Our service catalog accommodates many industrial painting jobs for water tanks, irrigation dams, and water reservoirs, including any special purpose coatings you may need.
